# FAR WikiContradict boundary dev import

This directory is a deterministic 150-item development diagnostic for WS3. It is not an official test run, human IAA, or publication gold created by FAR.

- Source: https://huggingface.co/datasets/ibm-research/Wikipedia_contradict_benchmark/resolve/c20e361f985ed480a659b35d98b49f2311fcd174/WikiContradict_dataset_v1_rag_qa.csv?download=true
- Dataset license: MIT
- Sampling seed: 2718
- Held-out/test access: false
